# ai-creator-os

> an AI operating system for creators — Obsidian vault as memory layer, Claude as chief of staff, MCP as the connective tissue. every workflow is simultaneously a tool, a content piece, and a product.

this repo documents a personal AI operating system used to run a real creator business: content strategy, music releases, consulting, novel writing, and monetization. it's structured so that another AI assistant can navigate it precisely — every content file has YAML frontmatter declaring its title, description, and tags.

primary use cases: setting up your own AI operating system on Obsidian + Claude + MCP, learning MCP server architecture, building workflows where the documentation is the product.

## core concepts

- [README](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/README.md): project overview, the core concept, quick start
- [TOOLS](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/TOOLS.md): full stack inventory with affiliate links
- [session-protocols/01_session_start](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/session-protocols/01_session_start.md): the file Claude reads first every session
- [session-protocols/02_domain_routing](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/session-protocols/02_domain_routing.md): how Claude knows which files to load for which task
- [session-protocols/03_content_session](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/session-protocols/03_content_session.md): the content batching protocol
- [vault-structure/folder-map](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/vault-structure/folder-map.md): the Obsidian vault structure
- [vault-structure/naming-conventions](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/vault-structure/naming-conventions.md): file naming rules that make the vault navigable

## stack documentation

- [stack/claude](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/claude.md): how Claude functions as chief of staff
- [stack/obsidian](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/obsidian.md): the memory layer
- [stack/mcp](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/mcp.md): Model Context Protocol overview
- [stack/typefully](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/typefully.md): X scheduling via MCP
- [stack/beehiiv](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/beehiiv.md): newsletter platform with MCP
- [stack/grok](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/grok.md): X-native search + image generation
- [stack/suno](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/suno.md): AI music generation with real prompt examples
- [stack/distrokid](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/distrokid.md): music distribution pipeline
- [stack/linear](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/stack/linear.md): project management via MCP

## custom MCPs

- [mcps/auny-vault](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/mcps/auny-vault.md): Obsidian vault MCP (read, write, search)
- [mcps/grok](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/mcps/grok.md): X-native search + reading X links
- [mcps/codex](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/mcps/codex.md): code review via OpenAI Codex
- [mcps/remotion](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/mcps/remotion.md): programmatic video generation

## workflows

- [workflows/content-batching](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/workflows/content-batching.md): a full day of content drafted to Typefully in one Claude session
- [workflows/music-release](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/workflows/music-release.md): Suno to DistroKid end-to-end pipeline
- [workflows/music-video](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/workflows/music-video.md): full music video from lyrics in one Grok Imagine Agent Mode conversation

## content types

- [content-types/written](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-types/written.md): posts, threads, newsletters, articles
- [content-types/art](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-types/art.md): AI image generation workflows
- [content-types/music](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-types/music.md): AI music workflow
- [content-types/video](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-types/video.md): three video workflows

## templates

- [templates/idea_card](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/templates/idea_card.md): capturing monetizable ideas
- [templates/session_log](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/templates/session_log.md): rolling log Claude reads every session
- [templates/workflow_doc](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/templates/workflow_doc.md): documenting any workflow you build
- [templates/monetization_tracker](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/templates/monetization_tracker.md): tracking revenue angles

## content system

- [content-system/content_pillars](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-system/content_pillars.md): building a pillar system for consistent content
- [content-system/formats_reference](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/content-system/formats_reference.md): post formats and what each one optimizes for

## setup

- [mcp-setup/setup_guide](https://github.com/auny-ai/ai-creator-os/blob/main/mcp-setup/setup_guide.md): connecting MCPs to Claude Desktop
